title: Bahrain Revoked Their Citizenship, and Then Tried to Expel Them to Iran
summary_full: Amid the war with Iran, Bahrain has stripped 69 people of their citizenship, including children, accusing them of disloyalty and rendering them stateless.
summary_public: Amid the war with Iran, Bahrain has stripped 69 people of their citizenship, including children, accusing them of disloyalty and rendering them stateless.

IR.label: negative
